run_id.description: Run identifier used for result metadata and the default output/<run_id> workspace plus result/<run_id> result path. It must not be a dot segment or contain path separators.

api_base_url.description: MALT daemon API endpoint. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:4317.

cas_endpoint.description: MALT CAS HTTP endpoint. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:4318.

output_dir.description: Disposable run workspace directory. The runner removes and recreates this directory before each run.

result_dir.description: Durable result directory for manifest, raw envelopes, and summary outputs.
